title: Just Another Structure Pack
description: Adds a few new structures to the Overworld.
body:
Just Another Structure Pack is a structure data pack that adds new structures to the Overworld. These structures fit well into vanilla gameplay and are also rarer structures that just add more ambience and encourage adventure and exploration of the world.


Structures include:

### Catacombs:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A9XFwNaH/images/20c668d93162dab6173ca839d01c09abd5ac87cb.png)
These rare, ominous structures spawn rarely in Taigas. The consist of a long entrance shaft and then a maze of twisting pathways. Contains lots of skeletons. 

### Bastion Outpost:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A9XFwNaH/images/df0d29a78eebf577ac1d97c8fd5e6ef59ab897ab.png)
This mysterious underground structure contains many Illagers including Illusioners. 

### Friendly Outpost:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A9XFwNaH/images/e32e7fcee561b535388ec5c794af9243ca7583d5.png)
Rare structures that contains villagers and early game loot. Spawn in most biomes.

### Illager Ship:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A9XFwNaH/images/43b55972f429fa6d7d52e3200de2f2a819b88c44.png)
Find illagers aboard a ship in most ocean biomes.

### Tower:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A9XFwNaH/images/d91a1acb3f95885b834d7ba6ebb542407fbc21b5.png)
Towers generate uncommonly in the world and act as waypoints. Contains loot with helpful exploration resources, and always contain a compass and lodestone. 

### Rustic Church:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A9XFwNaH/images/8151d5a04e034a4496e58f4c6e602642879ab573.png)
Small, ambient structure that spawns in forest biomes. Has a chance to spawn as a ruined variant.

### Overgrown Library:
Small structure that spawns in Lush Caves. A good source of enchanted books and bookshelves.

### Ambients
Small ruins found in deserts and forests, with more biomes planned for the future
